en.summary: This hadith presents a legal ruling from Imam al-Sadiq (AS) distinguishing between game caught by a dog — which is permissible to eat if the dog was trained and dispatched according to Islamic rules — and game caught by a falcon, which requires ritual slaughter (dhabh) before consumption even if the falcon caught and ate from it. The ruling reflects a core principle in Shia fiqh regarding hunting: the falcon is not counted among the permitted hunting animals whose catch is automatically permissible; its prey must be slaughtered to be halal. This distinction would have been immediately significant to the questioner as falconry and hunting were common practices in early Islamic society, and the permissibility of such prey was a matter of daily concern.

key_terms.الْبَازِي: The falcon (baz); in Islamic jurisprudence, its prey requires ritual slaughter unlike that of the hunting dog
key_terms.الصَّيْد: Hunting/prey; the act of hunting or the animal caught
key_terms.الذَّبْح: Ritual slaughter; the Islamic method of slaughtering an animal by cutting the throat
key_terms.فَضْل: Remains/leftovers; what remains after the hunting animal has eaten its portion

en.seo_question: Is it permissible to eat prey caught by a falcon in Islam if it ate from the prey?

ur.summary: امام صادق علیہ السلام نے یہ قانونی حکم دیا کہ باز کے شکار کو کھانے کے لیے ذبح ضروری ہے، خواہ باز نے اس میں سے کھا لیا ہو۔ یہ حکم اسلامی فقہ میں شکار کی حلت کے اصول کو واضح کرتا ہے۔

key_terms.الْبَازِي: باز — شکاری پرندہ؛ اس کا شکار بغیر ذبح کے حلال نہیں
key_terms.الذَّبْح: ذبح — اسلامی طریقے سے جانور ذبح کرنا

ur.seo_question: کیا باز کے شکار کو کھانا جائز ہے جب باز نے اس سے کھا لیا ہو؟

tr.summary: İmam Sadık (a.s.) şahinin avladığı hayvanın yenilebilmesi için İslami kurallara göre kesilmesi gerektiğine dair fıkhi hükmü beyan etmiştir. Bu hüküm, av hayvanlarının helal sayılabilmesi için gerekli şartları açıklamaktadır.

key_terms.الْبَازِي: Şahin; avı otomatik olarak helal sayılmayan av kuşu
key_terms.الذَّبْح: Kesim; İslami usule göre hayvan boğazlama

tr.seo_question: Şahin avladığı hayvanı yerse o hayvanı yemek helal midir?

fa.summary: امام صادق علیه السلام حکم فقهی این مسئله را بیان فرمود که شکار باز نیازمند ذبح شرعی است تا حلال باشد. این حکم تفاوت بین شکار سگ و شکار باز را در فقه شیعی روشن می‌کند.

key_terms.الْبَازِي: باز — پرنده شکاری که صیدش بدون ذبح حلال نیست
key_terms.الذَّبْح: ذبح — کشتن حیوان به روش شرعی اسلامی

fa.seo_question: آیا شکار باز وقتی از آن خورده باشد حلال است؟

id.summary: Imam Shadiq (a.s.) menyatakan hukum fikih bahwa buruan elang harus disembelih secara syar'i sebelum boleh dimakan. Ini membedakan antara buruan anjing terlatih dan buruan elang dalam hukum Islam.

key_terms.الْبَازِي: Elang; buruan elang tidak otomatis halal dan harus disembelih
key_terms.الذَّبْح: Sembelihan; penyembelihan hewan sesuai syariat Islam

id.seo_question: Bolehkah memakan buruan elang yang sudah dimakan oleh elangnya?

bn.summary: ইমাম সাদিক (আ.) ফতোয়া দিলেন যে বাজপাখির শিকারকে হালাল করতে হলে শরীয়ত অনুযায়ী যবেহ করতে হবে। এই হুকুম ইসলামী ফিকহে শিকারের হালাল হওয়ার শর্ত বর্ণনা করে।

key_terms.الْبَازِي: বাজপাখি — এর শিকার যবেহ ছাড়া হালাল নয়

bn.seo_question: বাজপাখি যদি শিকার থেকে খেয়ে ফেলে তাহলে কি সেই শিকার খাওয়া জায়েয?

es.summary: El Imam Sadiq (P) declaró la regla jurídica de que la presa del halcón requiere sacrificio ritual antes de ser consumida. Esta distinción refleja la diferencia entre la presa del perro de caza y la del halcón en la jurisprudencia islámica.

key_terms.الْبَازِي: El halcón; su presa no es automáticamente lícita y requiere sacrificio
key_terms.الذَّبْح: Sacrificio ritual; el método islámico de matar animales

es.seo_question: ¿Es permisible comer la presa del halcón si el halcón comió de ella?

fr.summary: L'Imam Sadiq (P) a énoncé la règle juridique selon laquelle la proie du faucon nécessite un abattage rituel avant d'être consommée. Cette distinction reflète la différence entre la proie du chien de chasse et celle du faucon dans la jurisprudence islamique.

key_terms.الْبَازِي: Le faucon ; sa proie n'est pas automatiquement licite et nécessite l'abattage
key_terms.الذَّبْح: Abattage rituel ; méthode islamique d'abattage des animaux

fr.seo_question: Est-il permis de manger la proie du faucon si ce dernier en a mangé ?

de.summary: Imam Sadiq (F) erklärte die juristische Regel, dass das Beutetier des Falken vor dem Verzehr rituelle Schlachtung erfordert. Diese Unterscheidung spiegelt den Unterschied zwischen dem Beutetier des Jagdhundes und dem des Falken im islamischen Recht wider.

key_terms.الْبَازِي: Der Falke; seine Beute ist nicht automatisch erlaubt und erfordert Schlachtung
key_terms.الذَّبْح: Rituelle Schlachtung; die islamische Methode der Tierschlachtung

de.seo_question: Ist es erlaubt, die Beute eines Falken zu essen, wenn der Falke davon gefressen hat?

ru.summary: Имам Садик (мир ему) провозгласил юридическое правило о том, что добыча сокола требует ритуального убоя перед употреблением в пищу. Это различие отражает разницу между добычей охотничьей собаки и добычей сокола в исламском праве.

key_terms.الْبَازِي: Сокол; его добыча не является автоматически дозволенной и требует убоя
key_terms.الذَّبْح: Ритуальный убой; исламский метод заклания животных

ru.seo_question: Можно ли есть добычу сокола, если сокол поел от неё?

zh.summary: 伊玛目萨迪格（愿主赐他平安）宣布了一项法学裁定：猎鹰捕获的猎物在食用前必须进行伊斯兰合法宰杀。这一裁定区分了猎犬与猎鹰在伊斯兰法学中的不同规定。

key_terms.الْبَازِي: 猎鹰——其猎物不自动合法，需要经过宰杀
key_terms.الذَّبْح: 宰杀——伊斯兰合法宰杀牲畜的方式

zh.seo_question: 如果猎鹰吃了猎物，还可以吃猎鹰的猎物剩余部分吗？

diacritics_changes: Added full tashkeel throughout the isnad chain
Added diacritics to matn text; normalized parenthetical honorific inline

isnad_matn.isnad_ar: الْحُسَيْنُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ مُعَلَّى بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ عَنْ أَبَانِ بْنِ عُثْمَانَ عَنْ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ قَالَ
isnad_matn.matn_ar: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ السَّلَامُ عَنْ رَجُلٍ أَرْسَلَ بَازَهُ أَوْ كَلْبَهُ فَأَخَذَ صَيْداً وَأَكَلَ مِنْهُ أَآكُلُ مِنْ فَضْلِهِمَا فَقَالَ لَا مَا قَتَلَ الْبَازِي فَلَا تَأْكُلْ مِنْهُ إِلَّا أَنْ تَذْبَحَهُ

narrators.ambiguity_note: Likely al-Husayn ibn Muhammad ibn 'Amir al-Ash'ari, a reliable narrator who transmits frequently in al-Kafi.

narrators.known_identity: Mu'alla ibn Muhammad al-Basri, a narrator in al-Kafi with many transmissions

narrators.ambiguity_note: Likely al-Hasan ibn Ali al-Washsha', a prominent narrator in Shia hadith tradition.

narrators.known_identity: Aban ibn Uthman al-Ahmar, a prominent companion of Imam al-Sadiq (AS) and one of the four hundred companions

narrators.name_ar: عَبْدُ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنُ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ
narrators.known_identity: Abd al-Rahman ibn Abi Abdillah al-Basri, a companion of Imam al-Sadiq (AS)
Imam Ja'far al-Sadiq (AS), the sixth Imam (d. 148 AH)

key_phrases.phrase_en: Abu Abdillah, peace be upon him (Imam al-Sadiq)

key_phrases.phrase_ar: مَا قَتَلَ الْبَازِي فَلَا تَأْكُلْ مِنْهُ إِلَّا أَنْ تَذْبَحَهُ
key_phrases.phrase_en: Whatever the falcon killed, do not eat from it unless you slaughter it

similar_content_hints.description: Hadiths in al-Kafi concerning the rules of hunting with trained dogs (al-kila'), specifying that the prey of a trained hunting dog dispatched in the name of God is permissible without slaughter, in contrast to the falcon ruling here.
Narrations about the conditions that make prey caught by hunting animals permissible (halal), including the requirement to mention God's name when dispatching the animal.

Quranic commentary hadiths on verse 5:4 ('They ask you what has been made lawful for them. Say: Lawful for you are all good things, and the prey caught by hunting animals') and its application to falcons versus dogs.
